text.title: product-discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-discovery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Discovery cycle extends beyond 4 weeks with the justification "we need more data".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Permanent stalling disguised as discovery is a decision avoidance pattern. Hard timeboxing forces the team to decide with the evidence at hand.
